title: Finding Relief with 7 Herbal Creams for Women and Rheumatoid Arthritis
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra creams may help alleviate symptoms of rheumatoid arthritis due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The cream typically contains glycyrrhizin, a compound that blocks the production of cortisol, a hormone involved in inflammation. It also contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the body.
